records.m_Talk_ENG: Please...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dame Grace, where are you?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dame Grace!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am here. There's no need to be in such a rush.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am here. There's no need to be in such a rush.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am here. There's no need to be in such a rush.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Take a moment to breathe. If you hurry, your steps will falter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. That won't be necessary.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You've arrived at the end of the story.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Surely you've realized it by now. The previous Star Guide met their end here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Surely you've realized it by now. The previous Star Guide met their end here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Surely you've realized it by now. The previous Star Guide met their end here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So there's no more need to flee, and no reason to press forward.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So there's no more need to flee, and no reason to press forward.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So there's no more need to flee, and no reason to press forward.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If this is the end, then...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If this is the end, then...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If this is the end, then...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a simple story. The star that should have guided the Empire was twisted by the Demon Lord's power.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a simple story. The star that should have guided the Empire was twisted by the Demon Lord's power.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a simple story. The star that should have guided the Empire was twisted by the Demon Lord's power.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The founding of the Order is said to have been a noble vow by the twelve houses, centered around the Star Guide...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The founding of the Order is said to have been a noble vow by the twelve houses, centered around the Star Guide...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The founding of the Order is said to have been a noble vow by the twelve houses, centered around the Star Guide...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But in truth, it was just a repetition of the past, driven by lingering regrets.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But in truth, it was just a repetition of the past, driven by lingering regrets.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But in truth, it was just a repetition of the past, driven by lingering regrets.

records.m_Talk_DEU: A hollow tale.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A hollow tale.

records.m_Talk_DEU: You're not yourself, Dame Grace.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're not yourself, Dame Grace.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if you say all this now, I...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if you say all this now, I...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if you say all this now, I...

records.m_Talk_DEU: The Star Guide was a failure, a loser.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Armaments I forged couldn't stop the world's ruin. My comrades fell before the Demon Lord.

records.m_Talk_FRA: The Armaments I forged couldn't stop the world's ruin. My comrades fell before the Demon Lord.

records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Is this really the ending you meant to show me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Is this really the ending you meant to show me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. This is the justice and fate of the Order you wished to reclaim.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. This is the justice and fate of the Order you wished to reclaim.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. This is the justice and fate of the Order you wished to reclaim.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As long as we retrace the path we once walked, the ending will always be the same.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As long as we retrace the path we once walked, the ending will always be the same.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As long as we retrace the path we once walked, the ending will always be the same.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You sound just like Sir Allen.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You sound just like Sir Allen.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You sound just like Sir Allen.

records.m_Talk_ENG: He said something he didn't mean at the very end, trying to push me away.
records.m_Talk_DEU: He said something he didn't mean at the very end, trying to push me away.
records.m_Talk_FRA: He said something he didn't mean at the very end, trying to push me away.





records.m_Talk_ENG: Why did you echo the words Sir Allen left behind?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why did you echo the words Sir Allen left behind?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why did you echo the words Sir Allen left behind?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Perhaps if I had been selfish, there could've been another choice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Perhaps if I had been selfish, there could've been another choice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Perhaps if I had been selfish, there could've been another choice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But maybe my resolve faded over time, or a fleeting moment washed over eternity.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But maybe my resolve faded over time, or a fleeting moment washed over eternity.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But maybe my resolve faded over time, or a fleeting moment washed over eternity.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I simply don't wish to burden someone else with the sin of my incompetence.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I simply don't wish to burden someone else with the sin of my incompetence.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I simply don't wish to burden someone else with the sin of my incompetence.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I never asked you to do that!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I never asked you to do that!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I never asked you to do that!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're kind, Esther.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're kind, Esther.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're kind, Esther.

And because you're kind
8v I don't want to lean on you and turn away from reality.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
And because you're kind

records.m_Talk_FRA:
And because you're kind
8v I don't want to lean on you and turn away from reality.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sure Allen felt the same.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sure Allen felt the same.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sure Allen felt the same.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dame Grace...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dame Grace...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dame Grace...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: As always, I let a passing nightmare dictate my feelings.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As always, I let a passing nightmare dictate my feelings.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As always, I let a passing nightmare dictate my feelings.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So forget everything and wake up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So forget everything and wake up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So forget everything and wake up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait... Dame Grace!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait... Dame Grace!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait... Dame Grace!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The scenery shifted in an instant.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The scenery shifted in an instant.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The scenery shifted in an instant.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What... just happened?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What... just happened?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What... just happened?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've taken the Star Guide's starlight.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've taken the Star Guide's starlight.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've taken the Star Guide's starlight.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Securing the most uncertain element this easily... It saved me trouble.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Securing the most uncertain element this easily... It saved me trouble.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Securing the most uncertain element this easily... It saved me trouble.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Excellent. Truly excellent.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Excellent. Truly excellent.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Excellent. Truly excellent.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now all the conditions for Armament succession are in place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now all the conditions for Armament succession are in place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now all the conditions for Armament succession are in place.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Aren't you... Sir Carantisir?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Aren't you... Sir Carantisir?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Aren't you... Sir Carantisir?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No way. This has to be a dream.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No way. This has to be a dream.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No way. This has to be a dream.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's been a while, kid. Still the same, I see.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's been a while, kid. Still the same, I see.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's been a while, kid. Still the same, I see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. Even those sickeningly pure eyes of yours haven't changed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. Even those sickeningly pure eyes of yours haven't changed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. Even those sickeningly pure eyes of yours haven't changed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? You reacted?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? You reacted?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? You reacted?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I suppose through your brother's help, you've got enough skill to pass for a knight.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I suppose through your brother's help, you've got enough skill to pass for a knight.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I suppose through your brother's help, you've got enough skill to pass for a knight.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...The Sagittarius Pale?! Why do you have one of the lost Star Armaments?!

records.m_Talk_FRA: ...The Sagittarius Pale?! Why do you have one of the lost Star Armaments?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh...! Ngh...!

records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh...! Ngh...!

records.m_Talk_FRA: It's been a while, so you got dull. For a trash like you to question me.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Yet, thankfully I'm in a good mood right now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So I'll do you the courtesy of treating you like a knight.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So I'll do you the courtesy of treating you like a knight.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So I'll do you the courtesy of treating you like a knight.

root.m_Talk_FRA: It's been a while, kid. Still the same, I see.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. Even those sickeningly pure eyes of yours haven't changed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. Even those sickeningly pure eyes of yours haven't changed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. Even those sickeningly pure eyes of yours haven't changed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? You reacted?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? You reacted?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? You reacted?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I suppose through your brother's help, you've got enough skill to pass for a knight.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I suppose through your brother's help, you've got enough skill to pass for a knight.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I suppose through your brother's help, you've got enough skill to pass for a knight.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...The Sagittarius Pale?! Why do you have one of the lost Star Armaments?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...The Sagittarius Pale?! Why do you have one of the lost Star Armaments?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...The Sagittarius Pale?! Why do you have one of the lost Star Armaments?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The previous captain was pursuing the Red Shift's lost Armament. So how...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: The previous captain was pursuing the Red Shift's lost Armament. So how...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: The previous captain was pursuing the Red Shift's lost Armament. So how...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh...! Ngh...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh...! Ngh...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh...! Ngh...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's been a while, so you got dull. For a trash like you to question me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's been a while, so you got dull. For a trash like you to question me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's been a while, so you got dull. For a trash like you to question me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yet, thankfully I'm in a good mood right now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yet, thankfully I'm in a good mood right now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yet, thankfully I'm in a good mood right now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So I'll do you the courtesy of treating you like a knight.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So I'll do you the courtesy of treating you like a knight.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So I'll do you the courtesy of treating you like a knight.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Draw your sword, knight of <color=#ffd34c>Chevalier</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Draw your sword, knight of <color=#ffd34c>Chevalier</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Draw your sword, knight of <color=#ffd34c>Chevalier</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll personally relieve you of that pathetic life.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll personally relieve you of that pathetic life.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll personally relieve you of that pathetic life.
